title: Backend Software Engineer

requirement_sentences.text: Build and maintain scalable backend services using Python
Design and manage relational databases (PostgreSQL or MySQL)
Deploy and monitor services on AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda)
Design clean RESTful APIs consumed by web and mobile clients
3+ years of professional software engineering experience
Experience with Docker and containerized deployments
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and automated testing
Experience with Kubernetes or other orchestration tools

raw_text: We are looking for a Backend Software Engineer to join our team. You will build and maintain scalable backend services using Python. You will design and manage relational databases. You will deploy services on AWS. You should have 3+ years of experience. Experience with Docker and CI/CD pipelines is a plus.
